chinese: 镀锌钢板的表面处理工艺需要严格控制温度和时间。
english: The surface treatment process for galvanized steel sheets requires strict control of temperature and time.
notes: Hot-dip galvanizing context; key terms: 镀锌钢板, 表面处理工艺

chinese: 热处理后的硬度和精度公差必须符合GB/T标准要求。
english: Hardness and dimensional tolerances after heat treatment must comply with GB/T standard requirements.
notes: Key terms: 热处理, 硬度, 精度公差; GB/T is the Chinese national standard prefix

chinese: 零件焊接和冲压件检验需要专业的质量控制流程。
english: Inspection of welded components and stamped parts requires a professional quality control process.
notes: Key terms: 零件焊接, 冲压件检验, 质量控制

chinese: 该合金钢的抗拉强度不低于600MPa，屈服强度不低于400MPa。
english: The tensile strength of this alloy steel shall not be less than 600 MPa, and the yield strength shall not be less than 400 MPa.
notes: Mechanical property specification from GB/T 5216 standard

chinese: 表面粗糙度Ra值应在0.8至1.6微米范围内，以确保良好的配合精度。
english: The surface roughness Ra value should be in the range of 0.8 to 1.6 micrometers to ensure good fit precision.
notes: Key terms: 表面粗糙度, 配合精度

chinese: 通过阳极氧化处理可以提高铝合金零件的耐腐蚀性和表面硬度。
english: Anodic oxidation treatment can improve the corrosion resistance and surface hardness of aluminum alloy parts.
notes: Key terms: 阳极氧化, 铝合金, 耐腐蚀性

chinese: 轴承的径向游隙应符合JB/T 10235规定的C3级别要求。
english: The radial clearance of the bearing shall comply with the C3 class requirements specified in JB/T 10235.
notes: Key terms: 轴承, 径向游隙; JB/T is the Chinese mechanical industry standard

chinese: 螺栓紧固扭矩必须按照工程图纸上规定的数值执行，不得超差。
english: The bolt tightening torque must be applied according to the values specified in the engineering drawing and must not exceed the tolerance.
notes: Key terms: 螺栓, 紧固扭矩, 工程图纸

chinese: 所有入库零件必须经过进料检验，合格后方可投入生产使用。
english: All incoming parts must pass incoming inspection before being approved for use in production.
notes: Quality management context; key terms: 进料检验, 入库, 合格

chinese: 铸铁件在机加工前需要进行时效处理，以消除内部残余应力。
english: Cast iron parts need aging treatment before machining to eliminate internal residual stress.
notes: Key terms: 铸铁件, 时效处理, 残余应力

chinese: 粉末涂层的附着力等级应达到1级，涂层厚度控制在60至100微米之间。
english: The adhesion grade of the powder coating should reach grade 1, with the coating thickness controlled between 60 and 100 micrometers.
notes: Key terms: 粉末涂层, 附着力, 涂层厚度

chinese: 齿轮加工完成后需进行渗碳淬火处理，表面硬度要求HRC58-62。
english: After gear machining, carburizing and quenching treatment is required, with a surface hardness requirement of HRC 58-62.
notes: Key terms: 齿轮, 渗碳淬火, 表面硬度; HRC is the Rockwell hardness scale

chinese: 焊接工艺评定应包括焊前预热、焊接参数控制及焊后热处理三个阶段。
english: Welding procedure qualification should include three stages: pre-weld preheating, welding parameter control, and post-weld heat treatment.
notes: Key terms: 焊接工艺评定, 预热, 焊后热处理

chinese: 形位公差包括直线度、平面度、圆度、圆柱度等几何特征的允许变动量。
english: Geometric tolerances include the permissible variations of geometric characteristics such as straightness, flatness, roundness, and cylindricity.
notes: GB/T 1184 shape and position tolerances; key terms: 形位公差, 直线度, 平面度

chinese: 注塑件的收缩率通常在0.3%至2.0%之间，具体数值取决于塑料材料的种类。
english: The shrinkage rate of injection-molded parts is typically between 0.3% and 2.0%, with the specific value depending on the type of plastic material.
notes: Key terms: 注塑件, 收缩率, 塑料材料

chinese: 钛合金零件的加工需要使用专用刀具，并严格控制切削速度和进给量。
english: Machining of titanium alloy parts requires specialized tooling with strict control of cutting speed and feed rate.
notes: Key terms: 钛合金, 切削速度, 进给量

chinese: 未注公差的线性尺寸和角度公差应遵循ISO 2768-m中等级要求。
english: Linear dimensions and angular tolerances without explicit tolerances shall follow the medium grade requirements of ISO 2768-m.
notes: ISO 2768 general tolerances; key terms: 未注公差, 线性尺寸, 角度公差

chinese: 高频感应淬火处理后，工件表面硬化层深度应达到1.5至3.0毫米。
english: After high-frequency induction hardening treatment, the surface hardened layer depth of the workpiece should reach 1.5 to 3.0 millimeters.
notes: Key terms: 高频感应淬火, 硬化层深度; relates to 高频淬火 in glossary

chinese: 装配时应确保各零件的配合间隙符合图纸要求，防止过盈或过松。
english: During assembly, ensure that the fit clearances of all parts comply with the drawing requirements to prevent interference fit or excessive looseness.
notes: Key terms: 装配, 配合间隙, 过盈; relates to 间隙 and 过盈 in glossary

chinese: 电镀镍层的厚度应均匀，允许偏差不超过标称厚度的15%。
english: The thickness of the electroplated nickel layer shall be uniform, with allowable deviation not exceeding 15% of the nominal thickness.
notes: Key terms: 电镀镍层, 厚度, 偏差; 'verified: false' because translation has not been reviewed by a domain expert

chinese: 钢板的厚度公差应符合GB/T 709规定的范围要求。
english: The thickness tolerance of steel plates shall comply with the range requirements specified in GB/T 709.

chinese: 铝合金型材经过阳极氧化处理后，耐腐蚀性显著提高。
english: After anodic oxidation treatment, the corrosion resistance of aluminum alloy profiles is significantly improved.

chinese: 不锈钢零件在焊接后需要进行固溶处理以恢复耐腐蚀性。
english: Stainless steel parts need solution annealing treatment after welding to restore corrosion resistance.

chinese: 碳钢的碳含量直接影响材料的硬度和韧性。
english: The carbon content of carbon steel directly affects the hardness and toughness of the material.

chinese: 铸铁件在使用前必须进行时效处理，以消除铸造残余应力。
english: Cast iron parts must undergo aging treatment before use to eliminate casting residual stress.

chinese: 钛合金的比强度高，广泛应用于航空航天和医疗器械领域。
english: Titanium alloy has a high specific strength and is widely used in aerospace and medical device fields.

chinese: 镁合金零件重量轻，但需要进行防腐处理以防止氧化。
english: Magnesium alloy parts are lightweight but require corrosion protection treatment to prevent oxidation.

chinese: 锻钢比铸钢具有更好的力学性能和冲击韧性。
english: Forged steel has better mechanical properties and impact toughness than cast steel.

chinese: 镀锌处理可以有效保护钢铁零件不受大气腐蚀。
english: Galvanizing treatment can effectively protect steel parts from atmospheric corrosion.

chinese: 电镀镍层可以提高零件的耐磨性和耐腐蚀性能。
english: Electroplated nickel coating can improve the wear resistance and corrosion resistance of parts.

chinese: 粉末涂层的固化温度通常在180至200摄氏度之间。
english: The curing temperature of powder coating is typically between 180 and 200 degrees Celsius.

chinese: 喷漆前必须对零件表面进行清洁和磷化处理。
english: Parts surfaces must be cleaned and phosphated before spray coating.

chinese: 镀铬处理后零件的表面硬度可达到HV800以上。
english: After chrome plating treatment, the surface hardness of parts can reach above HV800.

chinese: 热处理工艺参数包括加热温度、保温时间和冷却速度。
english: Heat treatment process parameters include heating temperature, holding time, and cooling rate.

chinese: 淬火处理后零件必须及时进行回火，以防止开裂。
english: After quenching treatment, parts must be tempered promptly to prevent cracking.

chinese: 退火处理可以消除冷加工引起的内部应力，改善材料塑性。
english: Annealing treatment can eliminate internal stress caused by cold working and improve material plasticity.

chinese: 渗氮处理可以显著提高零件表面的硬度和耐磨性。
english: Nitriding treatment can significantly improve the surface hardness and wear resistance of parts.

chinese: 正火处理用于消除铸件中的粗大晶粒和网状组织。
english: Normalizing treatment is used to eliminate coarse grains and network structures in castings.

chinese: 轴承的安装过盈量必须符合设计图纸的规定要求。
english: The interference fit of bearing installation must comply with the requirements specified in the design drawing.

chinese: 齿轮的齿面硬度应达到HRC55以上以保证使用寿命。
english: The tooth surface hardness of gears should reach above HRC55 to ensure service life.

chinese: 螺栓的材料等级和强度等级必须在图纸上明确标注。
english: The material grade and strength grade of bolts must be clearly marked on the drawing.

chinese: 螺母与螺栓的配合螺纹精度应符合6H/6g级要求。
english: The thread fit precision of nuts and bolts should comply with class 6H/6g requirements.

chinese: 垫圈的材料和规格应根据连接件的使用条件选择。
english: The material and specification of washers should be selected according to the service conditions of the fastened components.

chinese: 弹簧的自由长度和刚度系数必须满足设计要求。
english: The free length and spring rate of springs must meet the design requirements.

chinese: 密封件的材料应根据工作介质和温度范围选择。
english: The material of sealing components should be selected based on the working medium and temperature range.

chinese: 铸件的尺寸公差应按照GB/T 6414铸件尺寸公差标准执行。
english: Casting dimensional tolerances shall be executed in accordance with GB/T 6414 casting dimensional tolerance standards.

chinese: 锻件的内部缺陷检测通常采用超声波探伤方法。
english: Internal defect detection of forgings typically uses ultrasonic testing methods.

chinese: 铣削加工时应根据材料和刀具选择合适的切削参数。
english: During milling operations, appropriate cutting parameters should be selected based on the material and tooling.

chinese: 车削加工的表面粗糙度取决于进给量和刀尖圆弧半径。
english: The surface roughness in turning operations depends on the feed rate and tool nose radius.

chinese: 钻孔加工后的孔径公差应符合图纸标注的IT精度等级。
english: The hole diameter tolerance after drilling should comply with the IT precision grade marked on the drawing.

chinese: 磨削加工可以达到Ra0.4微米的表面粗糙度要求。
english: Grinding operations can achieve surface roughness requirements of Ra 0.4 micrometers.

chinese: 螺纹加工后需检查螺纹的中径、牙型角和螺距精度。
english: After thread machining, the pitch diameter, thread angle, and pitch accuracy need to be inspected.

chinese: 冲压件的毛刺高度不得超过材料厚度的10%。
english: The burr height of stamped parts must not exceed 10% of the material thickness.

chinese: 注塑件表面不允许有流痕、缩痕和熔接线等缺陷。
english: Injection-molded part surfaces are not allowed to have defects such as flow marks, sink marks, and weld lines.

chinese: 挤出型材的截面尺寸公差应符合GB/T 14846的规定。
english: The cross-section dimensional tolerance of extruded profiles shall comply with the provisions of GB/T 14846.

chinese: 焊接接头的抗拉强度应不低于母材强度的85%。
english: The tensile strength of welded joints should not be less than 85% of the base material strength.

chinese: 钎焊温度必须高于钎料的液相线温度但低于母材熔点。
english: The brazing temperature must be above the liquidus temperature of the filler metal but below the melting point of the base material.

chinese: 装配前所有零件必须清洁，去除油脂、切屑和异物。
english: All parts must be cleaned before assembly to remove grease, chips, and foreign matter.

chinese: 定位销的配合公差通常选用过渡配合或间隙配合。
english: The fit tolerance for locating pins usually uses transition fit or clearance fit.

chinese: 校准仪器时应在标准环境温度20摄氏度条件下进行。
english: Instruments should be calibrated under standard ambient temperature conditions of 20 degrees Celsius.

chinese: 对齐精度要求高的零件组装时应使用专用夹具定位。
english: Parts requiring high alignment precision should use dedicated fixtures for positioning during assembly.

chinese: 材料的抗拉强度和屈服强度是设计中最重要的力学参数。
english: Tensile strength and yield strength of materials are the most important mechanical parameters in design.

chinese: 材料硬度测试可以采用洛氏、维氏或布氏硬度计。
english: Material hardness testing can use Rockwell, Vickers, or Brinell hardness testers.

chinese: 材料的韧性通过冲击试验来评定，通常用冲击吸收能量表示。
english: Material toughness is evaluated through impact testing and is usually expressed as absorbed impact energy.

chinese: 材料的导热系数影响零件在加工和使用过程中的温度分布。
english: The thermal conductivity of materials affects the temperature distribution of parts during processing and use.

chinese: 弹性模量是材料抵抗弹性变形能力的重要指标。
english: The elastic modulus is an important indicator of a material's ability to resist elastic deformation.

chinese: 零件的质量控制应包括进料检验、过程检验和成品检验。
english: Quality control of parts should include incoming inspection, in-process inspection, and final product inspection.

chinese: 不合格品必须隔离存放并标识清楚，防止误用。
english: Defective products must be stored in isolation and clearly labeled to prevent misuse.

chinese: 产品的批号和检验记录应保存至少5年以便追溯。
english: Product batch numbers and inspection records should be retained for at least 5 years for traceability.

chinese: 检验报告应包括检验项目、检验方法、检验结果和结论。
english: Inspection reports should include inspection items, inspection methods, inspection results, and conclusions.

chinese: 认证产品需要定期接受认证机构的监督审查和抽样检验。
english: Certified products need to be periodically subject to supervision audits and sampling inspections by certification bodies.

chinese: 工程图纸上的尺寸标注应符合GB/T 4458.4的规定。
english: Dimension annotations on engineering drawings shall comply with the provisions of GB/T 4458.4.

chinese: 技术参数表应包括所有关键性能指标及其允许范围。
english: Technical specification sheets should include all key performance indicators and their allowable ranges.

chinese: 生产流程图应清楚标示每道工序的操作要求和检验点。
english: Manufacturing process flowcharts should clearly indicate the operation requirements and inspection points for each process step.

chinese: BOM表中应列出所有零件的件号、名称、材料和数量。
english: The BOM should list the part numbers, names, materials, and quantities of all components.

chinese: 包装箱上必须标注产品名称、规格、数量和生产日期。
english: Packaging cartons must be labeled with product name, specifications, quantity, and production date.

chinese: 产品运输时应防止碰撞和振动，避免损坏零件表面。
english: During product transportation, collision and vibration should be prevented to avoid damaging part surfaces.

chinese: 仓储条件应满足产品的温湿度要求，防止锈蚀和变形。
english: Storage conditions should meet the product's temperature and humidity requirements to prevent rust and deformation.

chinese: 库存管理应遵循先进先出原则，防止零件超出保质期。
english: Inventory management should follow the first-in, first-out principle to prevent parts from exceeding the warranty period.

chinese: 交货期延误时供应商应及时通知客户并提供替代方案。
english: When delivery is delayed, the supplier should promptly notify the customer and provide alternative solutions.

chinese: 轴的直线度误差应不超过全长的0.1毫米每米。
english: The straightness error of shafts should not exceed 0.1 mm per meter of total length.

chinese: 平面度公差要求高的零件需要在精密平台上进行研磨。
english: Parts with high flatness tolerance requirements need to be lapped on a precision surface plate.

chinese: 圆柱度误差直接影响轴和孔的配合质量与使用寿命。
english: Cylindricity error directly affects the fit quality and service life of shafts and bores.

chinese: 形位公差测量通常使用三坐标测量机进行精密检测。
english: Geometric tolerance measurement typically uses coordinate measuring machines for precision inspection.

chinese: 铝合金压铸件的内部气孔率应不超过规定的允许值。
english: The internal porosity of aluminum alloy die castings should not exceed the specified allowable value.

chinese: 钢板的焊接性能与其碳当量直接相关，碳当量越低越好。
english: The weldability of steel plates is directly related to their carbon equivalent, and a lower carbon equivalent is better.

chinese: 不锈钢应避免与碳钢工具接触，以防止接触腐蚀。
english: Stainless steel should avoid contact with carbon steel tools to prevent galvanic corrosion.

chinese: 铜合金导线的电导率通常以国际退火铜标准（IACS）百分比表示。
english: The electrical conductivity of copper alloy conductors is usually expressed as a percentage of the International Annealed Copper Standard (IACS).

chinese: 注塑模具的型腔表面粗糙度决定了产品的表面质量。
english: The surface roughness of injection mold cavities determines the surface quality of the product.

chinese: 锻造比影响锻件的内部组织致密度和机械性能。
english: The forging ratio affects the internal structure density and mechanical properties of forgings.

chinese: 冲压模具的凸凹模间隙直接影响冲压件的断面质量。
english: The punch-to-die clearance in stamping dies directly affects the cross-section quality of stamped parts.

chinese: 焊缝外观检查应包括焊缝宽度、余高和表面缺陷的评定。
english: Weld appearance inspection should include assessment of weld width, reinforcement height, and surface defects.

chinese: 设备校准证书的有效期通常为一年，到期前必须重新校准。
english: The validity period of equipment calibration certificates is typically one year, and recalibration must be performed before expiration.

chinese: 抛光处理可以将零件表面粗糙度降低到Ra0.05微米以下。
english: Polishing treatment can reduce the surface roughness of parts to below Ra 0.05 micrometers.

chinese: 偏差超出公差范围的零件应进行评审，决定报废或返工。
english: Parts with deviations exceeding the tolerance range should be reviewed to decide on scrapping or rework.

chinese: 螺栓连接的预紧力应通过力矩扳手按规定值进行控制。
english: The preload force of bolted connections should be controlled using a torque wrench according to the specified value.

chinese: 轴承润滑脂应按照制造商推荐的类型和用量定期补充。
english: Bearing lubricant should be replenished regularly in the type and quantity recommended by the manufacturer.

chinese: 金属零件的防锈处理应在机加工完成后及时进行。
english: Rust prevention treatment of metal parts should be carried out promptly after machining is complete.

chinese: 子组件在装配前应完成全部尺寸检验和功能测试。
english: Sub-assemblies should complete all dimensional inspection and functional testing before assembly.

chinese: 成品的验收标准应在合同中明确规定，避免争议。
english: The acceptance criteria for finished products should be clearly specified in the contract to avoid disputes.
